EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IBuildBoundaryParameters

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters for building the boundary of a mosaic dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B178F641-6536-4C94-9A99-20974850DB45")]
public interface IBuildBoundaryParameters

Properties

AppendToExistingBoundary

Indicates whether the computed boundary geometry is merged with existing mosaic boundary.

bool AppendToExistingBoundary { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

BufferDistanceFactor

The buffer factor applied on each item footprint before it is merged with the cumulative boundary geometry.

double BufferDistanceFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PerformWeeding

Indicates whether the computed boundary geometry is run through a point-weeding routine.

bool PerformWeeding { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveSlivers

Indicates whether polygons designated as slivers are removed from the boundary geometry.

bool RemoveSlivers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UpdateBoundary

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is updated with the computed boundary geometry.

bool UpdateBoundary { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

WeedTolerance

The tolerance for weeding points.

double WeedTolerance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet
